body:
test(api): add integration tests for leaderboard API and align schema

- Added comprehensive integration tests for GET /api/leaderboard in `tests/api/leaderboard.test.js`, covering default sorting, explicit sorting, pagination, and invalid inputs.
- Removed the `name` field from `UserSchema` to strictly align with the API documentation's registration requirements.
- Wrapped the server `start()` call in `src/index.js` with an environment check (`NODE_ENV !== 'test'`) and exported the `app` instance to prevent port conflicts when running tests with supertest.

Closes #40
title: Feat/add leaderboard integration tests
